chunks.text: Ph.D. Dissertations | EECS at UC Berkeley Ph.D. Dissertations - Koushik Sen Automated Testing, Verification and Repair of RTL Hardware Designs Kevin Laeufer [2024] Tools and Techniques for Building Programming Assistants for Data Analysis Rohan Bavishi [2022] Expanding the Reach of Fuzz Testing Caroline Lemieux [2021] Abstractions and Algorithms for Specializing Dynamic Program Analysis and Random Fuzz Testing Rohan Padhye [2020] Efficient Sampling of SAT and SMT Solutions for Testing and Verification Rafael Dutra [2019] Dynamic Analysis for JavaScript Liang Gong [2018] Guided GUI Testing of Android Apps with Minimal Restart and Approximate Learning Wonae Choi [2017] Dynamic and Interactive Synthesis of Code Snippets Joel Galenson [2014] Schedulability Analysis and Verification of Real-Time Discrete-Event Systems Christos Stergiou [2013] Active Testing: Predicting and Confirming Concurrency Bugs for Concurrent and Distributed Memory Parallel Systems Chang Seo Park [2012] Lightweight Specifications for Parallel Correctness Jacob Burnim [2012] Predictive and Programmable Testing of Concurrent and Cloud Systems Pallavi Joshi [2012]
